columns.extraction_plan: Progression-Free Survival (PFS) rates for the overall population in the treatment arm are not reported in the PDF. The document reports "Time to CRPC" (Time to Castration-Resistant Prostate Cancer) as a secondary endpoint, which is related but not the same as overall PFS.

Progression-Free Survival (PFS) rates for the overall population in the control arm are not reported in the PDF. The document reports "Time to CRPC" (Time to Castration-Resistant Prostate Cancer) as a secondary endpoint, which is related but not the same as overall PFS.
